name: Monkey King
description: There's a lot of stories about the Monkey King. Some of 'em are even true.

abilities.name: Mischief
abilities.description: Changes Monkey King's shape using the environment nearby to deceive opponents. Taking damage, attacking, or using any item or ability breaks the disguise. Negates damage for a brief moment upon transforming.

abilities.name: Boundless Strike
abilities.description: Applies a portion of Primal Spring max channeling duration of its corresponding level upon at the end location.

abilities.name: Tree Dance
abilities.description: While perched, he is hidden in plain sight. Grants Monkey King flying vision and the Primal Spring ability — a channeled leap attack.

abilities.name: Primal Spring
abilities.description: Springs out from his tree perch, damaging and slowing enemy units in proportion to the channel duration toward the landing area.

abilities.name: Jingu Mastery
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage and lifesteal for a number of subsequent attacks to its master.
